notes: Bug fixes: progress bar can no longer stick on Starting; cull rejects occluded/empty frames; About links to the online Manual.
notes_mac: Mac fixes: the menu-bar About box now shows the real version (was 0.0.0) with site + manual info, and the Adobe DNG Converter download actually starts (browser-open was broken in the packaged app). Includes the one-time DNG Converter setup and the personal 30-day full-app beta window.
